statusLine.command: input=$(cat); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name // empty'); effort=$(jq -r '.effortLevel // "default"' ~/.claude/settings.json); used=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); five=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.five_hour.used_percentage // empty'); week=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.seven_day.used_percentage // empty'); out=""; [ -n "$model" ] && out="$model"; [ -n "$effort" ] && { [ -n "$out" ] && out="$out  "; out="${out}effort:$effort"; }; [ -n "$used" ] && { [ -n "$out" ] && out="$out  "; out="${out}ctx:$(printf '%.0f' "$used")%"; }; [ -n "$five" ] && { [ -n "$out" ] && out="$out  "; out="${out}5h:$(printf '%.0f' "$five")%"; }; [ -n "$week" ] && { [ -n "$out" ] && out="$out  "; out="${out}7d:$(printf '%.0f' "$week")%"; }; echo "$out"
